meta.title: Very Few Parameter Fine tuning with ReFT and LoRA
meta.description:
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the Complete Scripts (and future improvements): https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-fine-tuning/
➡️ One-click fine-tuning and LLM templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms
➡️ Trelis Livestreams: Thursdays 5 pm Irish time on YouTube and X.
➡️ Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About

VIDEO RESOURCES:
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1_ZNQGKDQlqPsdJ5ttG6BRXusvZy5mdclHEpwfrwmkNQ/edit?usp=sharing
- StanfordNLP "pyreft" repo: https://github.com/stanfordnlp/pyreft

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 ReFT and LoRA Fine-tuning with few parameters
0:42 Video Overview
1:59 Transformer Architecture Review
10:14 Weight fine-tuning with LoRA
12:56 Representation Fine-tuning (ReFT)
18:23 Comparing LoRA with ReFT
20:51 Fine-tuning GPU setup
22:09 LoRA Fine-tuning walk-through
37:05 ReFT fine-tuning walk through
42:46 Combining ReFT fine-tunes
45:15 Orthogonality and combining fine-tunes
48:33 Limitations of LoReFT and LoRA fine-tuning
52:20 Fine-tuning tips
